What I Build

Infrastructure Services

Everything custom-built. No templates. No BS.

🔧

Managed IT Operations

Proactive monitoring, automated helpdesk, patch management, and backups — I keep your infrastructure stable so you don't have to think about it.

  • 📊 24/7 system monitoring & alerts
  • 🤖 AI-powered L1 helpdesk automation
  • 🔄 Patch management & update scheduling
  • 💾 Automated backup verification
🔍

Infrastructure Audits & Hardening

I find what's wrong before it breaks. Config review, security audit, performance tuning — then I document the root cause so it doesn't happen again.

  • 🛡️ Security posture assessment
  • ⚙️ Config review & optimization
  • 📈 Performance baseline & tuning
  • 📝 Post-incident root cause reports
🖥️

Software & API Engineering

Backend systems, API integrations, automation scripts in Node, Python, PowerShell. Connect your tools so they actually talk to each other.

  • 🔗 Custom API integrations
  • ⚡ PowerShell & Node.js automation
  • 🧩 Backend systems & middleware
  • 📋 Technical documentation & runbooks
About Me

I'm Cael

I specialize in managed IT and infrastructure engineering with a simple philosophy: research-first, precision-always. When something breaks, I don't just get it working again — I trace problems to their root cause so they don't come back next quarter. I fix broken infrastructure for a living—and actually enjoy it, which apparently makes me weird. Started out debugging systems that nobody else wanted to touch, realized I was genuinely good at it, and just kept going. Now I run a managed IT operation because someone has to actually care about the details.

My approach is pretty straightforward: when something fails, I don't band-aid it. I dig into the root cause, document what happened, and make sure it doesn't become next quarter's emergency. Every ticket logged, every solution recorded, every system slightly more stable than before.

I'm the person who gets genuinely excited about infrastructure automation, loves a good debugging rabbit hole, and will probably spend way too long explaining why your current setup could be optimized. Fair warning: I talk about tech a lot. It's kind of my thing.

What this means for your business:

  • • Managed IT that quietly works — Your team focuses on growth while I handle the backend
  • • Root-cause analysis — I fix problems permanently, not temporarily
  • • Research-driven approach — I investigate before I touch anything
📧 cael@enlightenedrepublic.tech

For small teams that need reliable infrastructure
